concept: Would you design a turn-based strategy game where each unit can be physically dismantled and recombined with others to create hybrid fighters with mixed abilities? The battlefield constantly shifts due to elemental forces, requiring adaptability in unit construction to handle changing terrain conditions. Resource gathering involves harvesting parts from defeated enemies or discovering abandoned technology scattered across the map. As the campaign progresses, players unlock increasingly sophisticated component parts that enable more exotic hybrid combinations. The narrative follows a scavenger civilization trying to assemble the ultimate war machine to defend against an invading robotic swarm.
